title: Lyonheart
description: The heart piece for all of Lyøn Mods' mods.
body:
Lyonheart is the heart piece for all of our upcoming mods.

It consists of code frequently used in other projects, like renderers, calculations & handlers. Lyonheart will also manage survival inventory tabs for accessories, the ODM gear in our "Attack on Titan" mod etc.

Besides the code, it also adds new building blocks (wood in different colors, checkered floor tiles candles etc.), items & two new ressources, tin & copper!

Based on our needs Lyonheart's list of features may grow.
